hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if [ -z "$CMD" ]; then exit 0; fi; if ! echo "$CMD" | grep -q "git commit"; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -iq "co-authored-by"; then echo "BLOCKED: Co-Authored-By trailers are forbidden in this project. Remove the trailer and retry." >&2; exit 2; fi; MSG=$(echo "$CMD" | sed -n "s/.*-m .*[\"\x27]\([^\"\x27]*\)[\"\x27].*/\1/p"); if [ -n "$MSG" ]; then if ! echo "$MSG" | grep -qE "^(feat|fix|docs|chore|ci|refactor|test|perf|style)(\(.+\))?: [a-z]"; then echo "BLOCKED: Commit message must follow conventional format: type(scope): lowercase description" >&2; echo "Valid types: feat, fix, docs, chore, ci, refactor, test, perf, style" >&2; echo "Got: $MSG" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if [ -z "$CMD" ]; then exit 0; fi; if ! echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git tag v[0-9]"; then exit 0; fi; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; PKG_VER=$(node -p "require(\"./package.json\").version"); MAN_VER=$(node -p "require(\"./manifest.json\").version"); DXT_VER=$(node -p "require(\"./manifest.json\").dxt_version"); SRC_VER=$(grep -o "version: \"[^\"]*\"" src/index.ts | head -1 | sed "s/version: \"//;s/\"//"); if [ "$PKG_VER" != "$MAN_VER" ] || [ "$PKG_VER" != "$DXT_VER" ] || [ "$PKG_VER" != "$SRC_VER" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: Version mismatch detected before tagging!" >&2; echo "  package.json:  $PKG_VER" >&2; echo "  manifest.json: $MAN_VER" >&2; echo "  dxt_version:   $DXT_VER" >&2; echo "  src/index.ts:  $SRC_VER" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if [ -z "$CMD" ]; then exit 0; fi; if ! echo "$CMD" | grep -q "git commit"; then exit 0; fi; MSG=$(echo "$CMD" | sed -n "s/.*-m .*[\"\x27]\([^\"\x27]*\)[\"\x27].*/\1/p"); if echo "$MSG" | grep -qE "^(feat|fix)"; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; if ! git diff --name-only HEAD~1 2>/dev/null | grep -q "CHANGELOG.md"; then echo "WARNING: You committed a feat/fix but CHANGELOG.md was not updated. Remember to add an entry." >&2; fi; fi; exit 0'
